wins_analysis: No wins today. Zero trades were executed as the only pending BUY order on ICICIBANK was never filled — price continued declining in the downtrend and never reached the demand zone entry level.
losses_analysis: No losses today either, but the core failure is systemic: the system placed a BUY order against a confirmed trending_down regime despite yesterday's learnings explicitly warning against this. The AI probability of 32% was extremely low, confirming the setup had no edge, yet the order was still placed.
regime_impact: The trending_down regime (ADX 25, Nifty -1.0%) made BUY setups essentially untradeable. The system correctly identified zero supply/SHORT setups but incorrectly placed a counter-trend BUY order anyway. The regime filter should have blocked this trade entirely — today's outcome validates that buying demand zones in downtrends produces no fills or losses.

improvements.action: Hard-block all BUY/demand-zone orders when regime is trending_down AND Nifty change < -0.5%. No exceptions regardless of zone score.
improvements.reason: ICICIBANK had a zone score of 58/60 but AI prob was only 32% and weekly data shows 0/4 wins buying in downtrends. The order should never have been placed.

improvements.action: Set minimum AI probability threshold to 55% for any order placement. Today's 32% probability trade should have been auto-rejected.
improvements.reason: 32% probability means the model itself predicts failure 68% of the time. Placing orders below 50% probability wastes capital allocation and attention.

improvements.action: On trending_down days, actively scan for supply zone SHORT setups on stocks with RS < 0 (weaker than Nifty). Prioritize INFY, TCS, HDFCBANK, and other high-beta names that tend to fall faster.
improvements.reason: Today found only 1 setup across all 50 stocks because the scanner likely prioritizes demand zones. Expanding SHORT/supply scanning would have found aligned setups.

improvements.action: If fewer than 3 regime-aligned setups are found, declare a NO-TRADE day rather than placing counter-trend orders to fill a quota.
improvements.reason: Today placed 1 counter-trend order just because it was the only setup available. Zero trades with zero P&L is better than forcing low-probability setups.

improvements.action: Add a pre-order checkpoint that cross-references the trade direction against regime. Log a warning and require override if direction conflicts with regime.
improvements.reason: The narrative correctly identified the contradiction ('This BUY setup contradicts the regime') yet the order was still placed. The system needs an automated gate, not just commentary.

tomorrow_focus: If downtrend continues (check gap-down or flat open), scan exclusively for supply zone SHORT setups on relatively weak stocks; if Nifty shows reversal signs (gap-up, VIX dropping below 14), then cautiously consider demand zones with AI prob > 60%.

symbol_notes.ICICIBANK: Demand zone at 1250.90 was never tested today — if downtrend persists tomorrow this level will likely break, invalidating it as support. Do NOT re-enter this BUY setup.
symbol_notes.NIFTY50: Two consecutive down days with ADX 25 suggests momentum sellers are in control. Watch for exhaustion signals (long lower wicks, VIX spike above 18) before considering any longs.
